questions.question: Which of the following best describes cloud computing?
options: Running applications only on a personal computer
Delivering IT resources over the internet on demand
Storing data only on local hard drives
questions.answer: Delivering IT resources over the internet on demand

questions.question: Which pricing model was repeatedly emphasized during the session?
questions.answer: Pay-as-you-go

questions.question: In the Black Friday example, why is cloud computing considered the best solution?
options: Businesses only pay for additional resources when needed
questions.answer: Businesses only pay for additional resources when needed

questions.question: What happens to extra cloud resources after the temporary demand is over?
options: They are automatically destroyed, and you stop paying for them
They are transferred to another company
questions.answer: They are automatically destroyed, and you stop paying for them

questions.question: Why does Netflix prefer using cloud services instead of building its own data centers?
options: Time and speed are more valuable than building infrastructure
questions.answer: Time and speed are more valuable than building infrastructure

questions.question: What is the biggest advantage cloud provides during temporary traffic spikes?
questions.answer: On-demand scalability

questions.question: What technology forms the foundation of cloud providers like AWS?
questions.answer: Virtualization

questions.question: Which concept is included in cloud economics?
questions.answer: Pricing flexibility

questions.question: Which feature ensures services continue running even if part of the infrastructure fails?
questions.answer: High Availability

questions.question: Does AWS have a limit to its capacity?
options: Yes, but it is so large that reaching it would take years
It depends on the operating system
questions.answer: Yes, but it is so large that reaching it would take years

questions.question: Do AWS employees freely access customer data?
options: No, customer data is protected through strict policies and encryption
questions.answer: No, customer data is protected through strict policies and encryption

questions.question: Which feature of cloud computing allows businesses to quickly increase or decrease computing resources based on demand?
questions.answer: Scalability

questions.question: Which of the following is a financial advantage of using AWS?
options: Paying only for the resources you use
Signing long-term contracts before using services
Maintaining your own physical data center
questions.answer: Paying only for the resources you use

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a major cloud service provider?
questions.answer: Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL)

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of virtualization in cloud computing?
options: To run multiple virtual machines on a single physical server
questions.answer: To run multiple virtual machines on a single physical server

questions.question: Which AWS pricing model helps organizations reduce infrastructure costs?
questions.answer: Pay-as-you-go pricing

questions.question: Which AWS feature enables applications to handle sudden increases in user traffic?
questions.answer: Elastic scalability

questions.question: Why do organizations choose AWS instead of building their own data centers?
options: AWS does not require internet connectivity
AWS provides on-demand, scalable infrastructure without large upfront hardware investments
AWS only supports Linux operating systems
AWS eliminates the need for cybersecurity
questions.answer: AWS provides on-demand, scalable infrastructure without large upfront hardware investments

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of cloud computing compared to traditional on-premises infrastructure?
options: Faster deployment of applications and services
questions.answer: Faster deployment of applications and services

questions.question: Which AWS concept refers to designing systems that continue operating despite component failures?
questions.answer: High Availability
